languages.text: Пыльца подлетает к чару и обволакивает его и исчезает. При этом нанося 15-30 токсичного урона, навешивая отравление в 15 на 2 раунда и Обездвиживание на 1 раунд

traits.locale_text: Пыльца подлетает к чару и обволакивает его и исчезает. При этом нанося 15-30 токсичного урона, навешивая отравление в 15 на 2 раунда и Обездвиживание на 1 раунд

languages.text: The carnivorous swarm envelops the target, vanishing into it, dealing <u>(from 15 to 30)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} and inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (15) and {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

languages.text: La nuée carnivore enveloppe la cible et se fond en elle, infligeant de <u>15 à 30</u> points de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}dégâts toxiques{/g}, ainsi que les effets {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} (15) et {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Immobilisation{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm envelops the target, vanishing into it, dealing <u>(from 15 to 30)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} and inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (15) and {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

traits.locale_text: La nuée carnivore enveloppe la cible et se fond en elle, infligeant de 15 à 30 points de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}dégâts toxiques{/g}, ainsi que les effets {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} (15) et {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Immobilisation{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

languages.text: Etçil sürü, hedefin etrafını sararak içinde kaybolur, <u>15-30</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toksik hasar{/g} verir ve {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} (15) ve {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g} etkileri oluşturur. Bu etkiler, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.

languages.text: 食肉虫群包裹并进入目标内部，造成<u>15-30点</u>{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒素伤害{/g}，并施加{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}（15）和{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm envelops the target, vanishing into it, dealing <u>(from 15 to 30)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} and inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (15) and {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 食肉虫群包裹并进入目标内部，造成15-30点{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒素伤害{/g}，并施加{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}（15）和{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。

languages.text: El enjambre carnívoro envuelve al objetivo y se introduce en su cuerpo, infligiendo <u>15-30</u> de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}daño tóxico{/g} y causándole los efectos {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} (15) e {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
languages.original_text: The carnivorous swarm envelops the target, vanishing into it, dealing <u>(from 15 to 30)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g} and inflicting {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (15) and {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

traits.locale_text: El enjambre carnívoro envuelve al objetivo y se introduce en su cuerpo, infligiendo 15-30 de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}daño tóxico{/g} y causándole los efectos {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} (15) e {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.

languages.text: Der Fleisch fressende Schwarm hüllt das Ziel ein und verschwindet darin. Dabei verursacht er <u>15-30</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}Giftschaden{/g} und bewirkt 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift {/g} (15) und {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}Gelähmt{/g}.

languages.text: 肉食の群れが標的を包み込み、標的に消えていく。{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒ダメージ{/g}を{g|Encyclopedia:From}15～30{/g}与え、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}（15）と{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}麻痺{/g}を1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}に与える。
